zh.lifeSummary: 當Helewisa de Lancaster於大約1204年出生在英國維斯特莫藍德肯達爾時，她的父親Gilbert FitzRoger FitzReinfred47歲，母親Helewise de Lancaster36歲。她於1213年與Sir Peter de Brus II在英國越可爾斯凱爾頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1245年在她的家鄉享年43歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Helewisa de Lancaster于大约1204年出生在英国維斯特莫藍德肯達爾时，她的父亲Gilbert FitzRoger FitzReinfred47岁，母亲Helewise de Lancaster36岁。她于1213年与Sir Peter de Brus II在英国越可爾斯凱爾頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1245年在她的家乡享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lancaster
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Lancaster in northwestern England, which is recorded as Loncastre in 1086. The place takes its name from the river Lune + Old English ceaster ‘city, Roman fortification’ (from Latin castra ‘legionary camp’). The river name is probably British, perhaps related to Gaelic slán ‘healthy’, ‘salubrious’.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Helewisa de Lancaster was born about 1204, in Kendal, Westmorland, England, her father, Gilbert FitzRoger FitzReinfred, was 47 and her mother, Helewise de Lancaster, was 36. She married Sir Peter de Brus II in 1213, in Skelton, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She died about 1245, in her hometown, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Helewisa de Lancaster est née environ 1204, à Kendal, Westmorland, Angleterre, son père, Gilbert FitzRoger FitzReinfred, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Helewise de Lancaster, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Peter de Brus II en 1213, à Skelton, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1245, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Helewisa de Lancaster um 1204 in Kendal, Westmorland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gilbert FitzRoger FitzReinfred 47 und ihre Mutter Helewise de Lancaster 36. Sie hat 1213 in Skelton, Yorkshire, England Sir Peter de Brus II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb um 1245 im Alter von 43 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Helewisa de Lancaster è nata il circa 1204 nel Kendal, Westmorland, England, sua padre, Gilbert FitzRoger FitzReinfred, aveva 47 anni e sua madre, Helewise de Lancaster, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato Sir Peter de Brus II nel 1213, nel Skelton, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì circa 1245, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 43 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Helewisa de Lancasterが約1204年にイギリスウエストモーランドケンダルで生まれた時，父Gilbert FitzRoger FitzReinfredは47歳，母Helewise de Lancasterは36歳であった。1213年にイギリスヨークシュアイアスケルトンでSir Peter de Brus IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1245年に故郷で43歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Helewisa de Lancaster(이)가 대략 1204년 영국 웨스트모를랜드 켄다에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gilbert FitzRoger FitzReinfred(은)는 47세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Helewise de Lancaster(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1213년 영국 요르크실르 스켈턴에서 Sir Peter de Brus II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1245년 그녀의 고향에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1204–about 1245: tany ho any amin'ny 1204–tany ho any amin'ny 1245

mn.Kendal Castle, Westmoreland, Cumbria, En: Kendal, Cumbria, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Helewisa de Lancaster nasceu aproximadamente 1204, em Kendal, Westmorland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Gilbert FitzRoger FitzReinfred, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Helewise de Lancaster, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Peter de Brus II em 1213, em Skelton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1245, em sua cidade natal, com 43 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Helewisa de Lancaster родилась около 1204 г. в местности кендаль, вестморланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Gilbert FitzRoger FitzReinfred было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Helewise de Lancaster, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Peter de Brus II в 1213 г. в местности скелтон, еркшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Она умерла около 1245 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 43 лет.

sm.about 1204–about 1245: e tusa o le 1204–e tusa o le 1245

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Helewisa de Lancaster nació aproximadamente 1204, en Kendal, Westmorland, Inglaterra, su papá, Gilbert FitzRoger FitzReinfred, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Helewise de Lancaster, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Sir Peter de Brus II en 1213, en Skelton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1245, en su pueblo, a la edad de 43 años.
